name: Poached Cod Fillets with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 large carrots, cut into julienne strips
3 ribs celery, cut diagonally into 1/2-inch pieces
1 lb cod fillets, thawed, drained and cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
Contains about 215 calories per serving.
1. In a saucepan, bring broth and lemon juice to boil. Add carrots; return to boil, then cover and cook over medium heat until almost tender, 5 to 8 minutes.
2. Add mushrooms, celery, onion, garlic, 1 teaspoon salt, tarragon, and cayenne. Cover and cook until celery is crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, sprinkle fish lightly with salt and pepper; place in a 15 x 10 x 1-inch pan lined with foil.
4. Pour vegetables and broth over fish. Cover with foil and bake in preheated 350°F oven for 15 minutes or until fish flakes easily with fork.
5. Serve with pan juices. Makes 4 servings.
